title: The finite DC mode of the zero signal is zero

source.citation: Lloyd N. Trefethen, Spectral Methods in MATLAB, SIAM, 2000, Ch. 3, pp. 17-28.
source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For any finite index set, the DC sum of the zero signal is zero.
assumptions: s is a finite index set
informal.expected_conclusion: The finite DC mode of the zero signal is zero.

declarations.name: finiteDC
declarations.statement: def finiteDC {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) (u : ι → Real) : Real := ∑ i ∈ s, u i

declarations.name: finiteDC_zero
declarations.statement: theorem finiteDC_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) : finiteDC s (fun _ => 0) = 0

tasks.input: Translate the finite-index spectral/DC identity `finiteDC_zero` into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem finiteDC_zero {ι : Type} (s : Finset ι) : finiteDC s (fun _ => 0) = 0
Unfold finiteDC and simplify the finite sum of zeros.
